title: Climate indicators - Canada.ca
content:
Climate change indicators help track greenhouse gas emissions and concentrations, as well as monitor the impacts of climate change.

## Greenhouse gas emissions and concentrations
- Greenhouse gas emissions (updated April 2026 )
- Greenhouse gas emissions from large facilities (updated April 2026)
- Greenhouse gas emissions projections (updated March 2026)
- Greenhouse gas concentrations (updated July 2025)
- Global greenhouse gas emissions (updated July 2025)
- Land-based greenhouse gas emissions and removals (updated October 2025)
- Greenhouse gas emissions from a consumption perspective (updated February 2025)

## Climate change impacts
- Precipitation change in Canada (updated May 2016)
- Temperature change in Canada (updated July 2025)
- Sea ice in Canada (updated February 2025)
- Snow cover (updated March 2026)
- Extreme heat events (new February 2025)
Greenhouse gas emissions
Temperature change in Canada
